textByHashes.996eb1355fc8dfd1827d2872789dd6ac5d28a7d8: Well stop distracting me then. I'm meant to be guarding this sacred statue from the temple of Marimbo.
textByHashes.d93b396e35090512c8413343bd87a93480ac33c3: You're not from around here are you?
textByHashes.7790ceb6a2d33fd7d902cc3367c8629dea06a962: Very well. The temple is to the east of the village.
